StyledText.Data: Modify Page item in <<FAT Title::Reference title>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Duration" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Label" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block Thumbnail" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list checkbox"

StyledText.Data: Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type>> <<FAT Modifier @ Page item::Description>>

LayoutObject.name: Media filename

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV PI::Container file extension )

LayoutObject.name: String Number Value

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Sync server path" And FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Link"

LayoutObject.name: Color Value
Package id
Page id value
Color FM

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Color" Or Platform ≠ "Desktop"

LayoutObject.name: Link
Text Input value

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block navigation menu visibility" And (FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Value list radio" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Value list checkbox")
ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) <5 Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio"
ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Page item::ValuesList) > 4 Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio"
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list checkbox"

StyledText.Data: Building block: <<FAT Block @ Page item::Name>> • <<ƒ:Substitute ( DisplayText; "¶"; "")>>
When “yes” is ticked, the video in this block will be played using the browser’s native video player. This will enable features like full-screen.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "level" ; "page item" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey )& SetProperty ( "block_id" ; FAT Page item::Block id )

StyledText.Data: Text style - <<BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label override text 1>>

LayoutObject.name: TextStyle Value
String Number Value 2
String Number Value 2 Copy
String Number Value 2 Copy2
String Number Value 2 Copy4
String Number Value 2 Copy7
String Number Value 2 Copy3
String Number Value 2 Copy6
String Number Value 2 Copy5

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty(BlockTemplate @ Page item::Text 1 Style type) Or FAT Block @ Page item::Number of text fields<1
